summary: Multi-page responsive website with different pages (Home, About, Menu, Contact, Category) featuring desi Indian dhaba aesthetic with category filtering functionality
architectural_notes: Responsive design required for all screen sizes
Multi-page architecture with separate routes instead of single-page scroll navigation
Tech stack: React.js frontend, Node.js/Express backend
Styling: Bootstrap + CSS (no Tailwind CSS), jQuery for interactivity
Must be runnable in VS Code locally

existing_features.title: Create a hero section with the cafe name 'THE URBAN RASOI' and a welcoming tagline that introduces the cafe
Create an About section describing THE URBAN RASOI's story, atmosphere, and unique offerings
Create a Menu section showcasing the cafe's food and beverage offerings with categories (e.g., beverages, meals, desserts) and pricing
Create a Contact section with the cafe's location, hours of operation, phone number, and a contact form for inquiries
Implement fully responsive design that adapts seamlessly to mobile, tablet, and desktop screen sizes
Create a navigation header with links to all major sections (Home, About, Menu, Contact) that remains accessible on all pages
Apply a warm, inviting visual theme with earthy tones and modern typography that reflects an urban cafe aesthetic, ensuring consistent styling across all sections
Render generated images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated for hero background, cafe interior photos, and food/beverage imagery

Convert the single-page application into a multi-page website with separate routes for Home, About, Menu, Contact, and Category pages where users must click navigation links to access different pages instead of scrolling
Create a Category page with filtering functionality for different food establishment types including cafe, dhaba, and other categories
Replace the current warm cafe aesthetic with an authentic desi Indian dhaba visual theme featuring dhaba-style imagery and design elements
Implement the entire frontend using Bootstrap for styling and layout instead of Tailwind CSS, and include jQuery for interactivity to ensure VS Code compatibility
Design each page (Home, About, Menu, Contact, Category) with distinct layouts that differ from the current single-page design

Remove the north/south location filter dropdown from the Contact page and replace it with a single embedded interactive map component that displays the exact location: 622, Ushanagar, Narendra Tiwari Marg, Annapurna Road, Indore

new_feature_requests.summary: Convert single-page website to multi-page with separate routes for Home, About, Menu, Contact, and Category pages
Add Category page with filtering options for cafe, dhaba, and other food establishment categories
Apply desi Indian dhaba aesthetic with authentic dhaba-style photos and different layout
Build with React.js frontend and Node.js/Express backend
Use Bootstrap and CSS (no Tailwind CSS) with jQuery for VS Code compatibility
Replace location filter dropdown (north/south) with real embedded map showing exact location: 622, Ushanagar, Narendra Tiwari Marg, Annapurna Road, Indore

Update the backend ContactData type and getContactData method to return a single location object with the address '622, Ushanagar, Narendra Tiwari Marg, Annapurna Road, Indore' instead of multiple location options
